info.title: Authify API
info.description:
Authentication and user management API for Authify.

All protected endpoints require a bearer access token (JWT) issued by the `/api/auth/login` or `/api/auth/signup` endpoints.

bearerAuth.description: Include the access token as: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

password.description: Minimum 8 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

refreshToken.description: Refresh token issued by the login/signup endpoint

newPassword.description: New password matching signup password rules
Minimum 8 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

value.error: Password must be at least 8 chars and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

post.summary: Refresh access token using a refresh token

200.description: Password reset email requested (response is the same whether the email exists or not)

value.message: If the email exists, a password reset link has been sent

post.summary: Resend verification email to the authenticated user

400.description: Email already verified or other validation error

post.summary: Upload and set user's profile picture

200.description: Profile picture uploaded and profile updated
